more.title: ZRP Seeks Information On Highly Wanted Drug Lords Linked To Explosives And Armed Robbery Cases
more.description: ZRP Names Three Highly Wanted Drug Lords Linked To Explosives And Armed Robberies The Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) has launched a public appeal for information that could lead to the arrest of three alleged drug lords accused of running syndicate drug bases in Harare’s high-density suburbs while using fortified homes, CCTV systems and vicious dogs [...] The post ZRP Seeks Information On Highly Wanted Drug Lords Linked To Explosives And Armed Robbery Cases appeared first on iHarare News .

more.title: Harare’s 20 AI Robocop Traffic Cameras Will Start Fining Drivers In June 2026
more.description: Harare Motorists To Receive Digital Traffic Fines Under New AI System Harare motorists will begin facing fines from 20 artificial intelligence-powered “Robocop” traffic cameras starting in June 2026 after the Government confirmed that testing of the new smart enforcement system is set to begin next month. The high-tech surveillance system is being installed at key [...] The post Harare’s 20 AI Robocop Traffic Cameras Will Start Fining Drivers In June 2026 appeared first on iHarare News .

more.title: Zimbabwe Central Bank releases ZiG669 million in new banknotes
more.description: The Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe has released new local currency banknotes worth ZiG669 million into circulation as part of efforts to improve cash availability and encourage wider use of the ZiG currency. According to RBZ Governor John Mushayavanhu, the amount released represents about 3 percent of total ZiG deposits in the banking sector, which stood [...] The post Zimbabwe Central Bank releases ZiG669 million in new banknotes appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .
